sections.title: When giving a command to a gangster

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Bring some of the heavy squad to carry the crates.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Get this right and I'll see you're well paid.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: If the shopkeeper won't cooperate, kill his wife.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: If the soldiers try to interfere, kill them.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Make sure the captain knows not to talk.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Our ship is due with the evening tide.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Pay attention or I'll rip your throat out.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: The boxes marked with a cross are ours.

lines.speaker: Gang boss
lines.text: Weigh the gold carefully in case he double-crosses us.

sections.title: When departing from a gang meeting
